title: More Potatoes
description: Adds a whole lot of potato related stuff!
body:
This is my brand new datapack, **More Potatoes.** The main point of the pack is to add some potato variations and enchantments that help with farming potatoes. For the V1.0 the datapack introduces 8 new potato variations, 1 new stew and 2 new enchantments.

This datapack will be updated in the near future with more potato variations, more enchantments. An advancement tab. A new boss? A new dimension?
